description: Use this API to retrieve the comments for the specified group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, comments = scenariogroupgetcomments(sgroup)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group whose comments are to be returned. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: comments
return_values.description: The comment string for the specified group. use scenariogrouplengthcomments to get required buffer size, if needed. (output).
